component.name: ScrollArea
component.description: Custom-styled scrollable container with overlay scrollbars.

useCases: Scrollable dropdown or command list content
Code blocks or log viewers with constrained height

commonPatterns.name: vertical-scroll
commonPatterns.description: Container with a fixed height and vertical scrolling

commonPatterns.name: horizontal-scroll
commonPatterns.composition: {items}

antiPatterns.scenario: Using ScrollArea without a constrained height or width
antiPatterns.reason: Without a size constraint the scroll area expands to fit content and never scrolls
antiPatterns.alternative: Set a height (or max-height) for vertical scroll, or width for horizontal scroll

antiPatterns.reason: Nested custom scrollbars create confusing UX and scroll-trapping
antiPatterns.alternative: Use a single ScrollArea at the outermost scrollable boundary

slots.ScrollBar: Custom scrollbar (vertical by default, can add horizontal)

parentConstraints: Must have constrained dimensions to enable scrolling

interactions.scroll: Content scrolls with custom overlay scrollbar

responsive.mobile: Touch scroll with custom scrollbar hidden during inactivity

accessibility.keyboardSupport: Viewport is focusable; arrow keys scroll content
accessibility.focusManagement: Viewport has focus-visible ring for keyboard users

rules: Always set a constrained height or width on ScrollArea for scrolling to activate
Add an explicit ScrollBar with orientation="horizontal" if horizontal scrolling is needed

aiHints.context: Use for custom-styled scrollable containers. Replaces native scrollbars with overlay scrollbars via Radix. Must have constrained dimensions. Includes vertical scrollbar by default; add ScrollBar orientation="horizontal" for horizontal scrolling.
